falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 indicates a confirmed market top, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above $50,000 (key resistance level from bottom_2024_aug pattern) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this level would confirm a bullish trend, disproving the pattern's similarity to a bottom and invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 200% above the 14-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge would indicate a confirmed market move (either bullish or bearish), falsifying the HOLD signal by proving a clear directional bias.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
